# CSA Legacy Python Descriptive Analysis

This public repository preserves a legacy Python workflow for an unpublished central sleep apnea descriptive analysis.

It is not the code repository for the later CPAP-prescribing publication. The separate downstream Stata repository for that final paper workflow is:

https://github.com/reblocke/CSA-CPAP-Prescribing

## Use

Run the legacy Python workflow with:

```bash
python DataAnalysis.py --input data/private/CSA-Db-Working.xlsm --output-dir outputs/legacy-python
```

The original patient-level workbook is restricted EHR/sleep-center data and is not public. Users must supply an authorized local workbook matching the expected historical column layout in DATA_DICTIONARY.md.

## Important Files

- README.md: human-readable overview, workflow, data restrictions, citation, and license guidance.
- CITATION.cff: machine-readable repository software citation metadata.
- DATA_DICTIONARY.md: expected workbook columns, derived fields, and category mappings.
- REPRODUCING.md: local reproduction workflow with restricted data.
- DataAnalysis.py and ReadExcel.py: legacy Python source code.
- tests/fixtures/synthetic_csa_workbook.xlsx: synthetic no-PHI smoke-test workbook.

## Safety

Do not add raw clinical data, PHI, credentials, local path files, private manuscript drafts, or publisher-formatted article text. Historical generated PNG/XLSX files were moved out of the default branch and archived in the legacy-python-outputs-2026-06-03 GitHub release.
